==================================
Decorated exported struct
==================================

@Component
export declare struct Foo {
  @State count: number;
  build(): void;
}

---

(program
  (export_statement
    (decorator
      (identifier))
    (struct_declaration
      (type_identifier)
      (struct_body
        (public_field_definition
          (decorator
            (identifier))
          (property_identifier)
          (type_annotation
            (predefined_type)))
        (method_signature
          (property_identifier)
          (formal_parameters)
          (type_annotation
            (predefined_type)))))))

==================================
Export default struct
==================================

export default struct HelloWorld {
  build() {
    Column() {
      Text("Hello ArkTS")
    }
  }
}

---

(program
  (export_statement
    (struct_declaration
      (type_identifier)
      (struct_body
        (method_definition
          (property_identifier)
          (formal_parameters)
          (statement_block
            (expression_statement
              (arkui_component_expression
                (identifier)
                (arguments)
                (arkui_children
                  (expression_statement
                    (arkui_component_expression
                      (identifier)
                      (arguments
                        (string
                          (string_fragment))))))))))))))

==================================
Annotation declaration
==================================

@interface RouteOptions {
  value: string = "default";
  count: number = 1;
}

---

(program
  (annotation_declaration
    (type_identifier)
    (annotation_body
      (annotation_property_definition
        (property_identifier)
        (type_annotation
          (predefined_type))
        (string
          (string_fragment)))
      (annotation_property_definition
        (property_identifier)
        (type_annotation
          (predefined_type))
        (number)))))

==================================
ArkUI component expression
==================================

@Builder
function test() {
  abc() {
    Text("Hello")
  }
}

---

(program
  (function_declaration
    (decorator
      (identifier))
    (identifier)
    (formal_parameters)
    (statement_block
      (expression_statement
        (arkui_component_expression
          (identifier)
          (arguments)
          (arkui_children
            (expression_statement
              (arkui_component_expression
                (identifier)
                (arguments
                  (string
                    (string_fragment)))))))))))

==================================
Exported ArkUI builder function
==================================

@Builder
export function test() {
  abc() {
    Text("Hello")
  }
}

---

(program
  (export_statement
    (decorator
      (identifier))
    (function_declaration
      (identifier)
      (formal_parameters)
      (statement_block
        (expression_statement
          (arkui_component_expression
            (identifier)
            (arguments)
            (arkui_children
              (expression_statement
                (arkui_component_expression
                  (identifier)
                  (arguments
                    (string
                      (string_fragment))))))))))))

==================================
Plain call followed by block
==================================

function test() {
  foo()
  {
    bar()
  }
}

---

(program
  (function_declaration
    (identifier)
    (formal_parameters)
    (statement_block
      (expression_statement
        (call_expression
          (identifier)
          (arguments)))
      (statement_block
        (expression_statement
          (call_expression
            (identifier)
            (arguments)))))))

==================================
Plain assignment followed by block
==================================

function test() {
  MPPerformance.loadBundleHitCache = false
  {
    hit: false
  }
}

---

(program
  (function_declaration
    (identifier)
    (formal_parameters)
    (statement_block
      (expression_statement
        (assignment_expression
          (member_expression
            (identifier)
            (property_identifier))
          (false)))
      (expression_statement
        (object
          (pair
            (property_identifier)
            (false)))))))

==================================
Return before object block
==================================

function test() {
  return
  { value: 1 }
}

---

(program
  (function_declaration
    (identifier)
    (formal_parameters)
    (statement_block
      (return_statement)
      (expression_statement
        (object
          (pair
            (property_identifier)
            (number)))))))

==================================
Extend function with leading dot chain
==================================

@Extend(Text)
function fancy(fontSize: number) {
  .fontColor(Color.Red)
  .fontSize(fontSize)
}

---

(program
  (function_declaration
    (decorator
      (call_expression
        (identifier)
        (arguments
          (identifier))))
    (identifier)
    (formal_parameters
      (required_parameter
        (identifier)
        (type_annotation
          (predefined_type))))
    (statement_block
      (expression_statement
        (leading_dot_expression
          (call_expression
            (member_expression
              (call_expression
                (identifier)
                (arguments
                  (member_expression
                    (identifier)
                    (property_identifier))))
              (property_identifier))
            (arguments
              (identifier))))))))

==================================
Lazy import
==================================

import lazy { Foo as Bar } from "mod";

---

(program
  (import_statement
    (lazy_import_statement
      (import_clause
        (named_imports
          (import_specifier
            (identifier)
            (identifier))))
      (string
        (string_fragment)))))

==================================
Optional struct method
==================================

struct A {
  aboutToAppear?(): void {
  }
}

---

(program
  (struct_declaration
    (type_identifier)
    (struct_body
      (method_definition
        (property_identifier)
        (formal_parameters)
        (type_annotation
          (predefined_type))
        (statement_block)))))
